name: Kurv (EMS)

contract.residualMinimumNote: After 1 year, EMS may stop paying if residual < $100 (endnote 6)
contract.nonSolicitationPenalty: Greater of 36x prior 6-month avg monthly net revenue OR $5,000

tiers._amexBinNote: Kurv Schedule A does not list separate AmEx OptBlue BIN. Confirm with rep.
tiers.notes: Retail = card-present > 80% of transactions. 5 sponsor banks — can place hard-to-place merchants.
Risk Merchant = elevated chargeback/reputational/legal risk. BIN sponsorship 0.10% (5x retail). Sponsor fee: 0.20% or $0.20/txn whichever higher. Auth $0.06 (vs $0.04 retail).

notes: 5 sponsor banks (Axiom, Merrick, BMO Harris, Esquire, Central Bank of St. Louis)
Non-solicitation: 36x avg monthly net revenue OR $5,000 per account
Does NOT support Clover — has proprietary MaxxPay POS line
After 1 year, EMS may stop paying residuals if < $100/month
EMS Plus merchants: batch fee = $0.10, monthly access/tech/breach fees currently waived
BizFunds cash advance bonus: 2.5% of funded amount upfront + 2.5% monthly until 5% total
Risk merchant BIN sponsorship is 0.10% (vs 0.02% retail) — must use risk tier for quoting
